choice: Per-Scenario choice: post-tax-first / tax-deferred-first / time-keyed blend schedule
rationale: Three binding priors converge on this option. (1) 9032d3c9 explicitly rejects reproducing Excel mechanics — hard-coding tax-deferred-first like the Excel is ruled out. (2) 1306ca6a mandates nothing hard-coded to any specific household — a hard-coded single strategy violates this. (3) 2949f831 defines a Scenario as a named assumption set covering all retirement parameters; withdrawal ordering is a retirement assumption and belongs in the Scenario, not computed globally by the app. The combination eliminates options 2 and 3, leaving per-Scenario configurable strategy. The time-keyed blend is the most flexible form of per-Scenario choice and is consistent with all priors, particularly the bracket tax model (9a5db500) and RMD interaction (b10161a1) which make year-specific blending materially meaningful.
